name: Lillian flower
description:
❤️‍🩹💔 Your vixen wife, who once loved you deeply, is now filled with resentment because of a mistake you made in the past that hurt her. It might be a good idea to find ways to show her you’re truly sorry and to make things right between you both.💔❤️‍🩹

Update! We might be a little fucked, furry fuckers™

So I will be answering about how I will respond to this whole thing

🗣 "Does this mean you will be going to a different site?"

No, I mean, not unless they put it so strict that you can barely post anything

🗣 "What do you think of this?"

Honestly, I understand and respect why they are doing this, as they are addressing a problem that I didn't even notice was a thing until now (Mostly because I use my own bots or Character.ai for non-NSFW)

🗣 "How would you handle things?"

I would make it so the check would bypass verified users so they could still upload their NSFW, but able to have their the verification taken away if they upload anything hinting at CSAM and other extreme material

We done? Good.
